Part-Time Instagram Content Creator for Women's Fashion Brand
We are a growing Indian fashion brand specializing in premium cotton coord sets, sarees, dupattas, and kidswear.
We are looking for a creative freelancer to help us create and manage Instagram content using our existing product photos, model shoot images, and videos.
Responsibilities: • Create 12–15 Instagram Reels per month from existing content • Design 6–8 Canva carousel posts per month • Write simple captions and hashtags • Schedule posts through Meta Business Suite • Suggest content ideas and trending reel formats relevant to fashion
Requirements: • Experience creating Instagram content for fashion, lifestyle, apparel, or ecommerce brands • Good Canva skills • Basic video editing skills (CapCut, VN, InShot, Premiere Rush, etc.) • Understanding of Instagram Reels and current content trends • Ability to maintain a clean, premium, feminine aesthetic
What We Will Provide: • Product photos and model shoot images • Brand guidelines and product information • Content direction and collection details
This is not a social media manager role. We are specifically looking for someone who can create attractive, conversion-focused content from existing assets.
To Apply: Please share:
3 Instagram pages you have worked on
5 reel samples
2 Canva carousel samples
Your monthly fee
Budget: ₹5,000–8,000 per month (part-time/freelance)
Bonus if you have worked with ethnic wear, sustainable fashion, handmade products, or women's apparel brands.

full_description:
# AI Content Writer & Editor (Railway Education) – Long-Term Remote Project

## Budget

**₹10,000–20,000 per month (Negotiable based on experience)**

**Project Type:** Part-Time | Long-Term | Remote

---

# About the Project

I am building one of India's leading digital learning platforms for **Indian Railway LDCE (30%), JE, SSE, AME and Mechanical Department examinations**.

I have a large collection of:

* Railway Manuals
* Railway Board Circulars
* Coaching Notes
* Previous Year Question Papers
* Question Banks
* Technical PDFs
* Workshop Documents
* Official Railway Publications

I am looking for an AI-savvy content writer and editor who can convert these documents into premium educational content.

**This is NOT a research job.**

I will provide all source materials. Your responsibility is to transform them into high-quality original educational content.

---

# Responsibilities

Using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, NotebookLM, Gemini or similar, create:

### Weekly Blog Articles

* 1,500–3,000 words
* SEO-friendly
* Easy to understand
* Original content
* Proper headings and formatting

---

### Monthly Railway e-Magazine

Create one professionally written digital magazine every month.

Approximately **40–60 pages** containing:

* Railway Technical Articles
* Concept Explanations
* Previous Year Question Analysis
* Workshop Best Practices
* Railway Current Developments
* Railway Board Circular Summaries
* Safety Corner
* Mechanical Engineering Concepts
* Interview Questions
* Railway Facts
* Monthly MCQ Practice Set
* Revision Notes

---

### PDF Study Notes

Prepare clean and professionally formatted PDF notes suitable for students.

---

### MCQ Explanations

Write detailed explanations for Railway MCQs using the provided answer keys and references.

---

### Content Updating

Convert newly provided Railway PDFs into:

* Blog Posts
* Magazine Articles
* Revision Notes
* Technical Summaries

---

# What I Will Provide

* Railway PDFs
* Manuals
* Question Banks
* Notes
* Official Circulars
* Topic List
* Editorial Guidelines

No independent research is required unless specifically requested.

---

# Required Skills

Must have experience with:

* ChatGPT
* Claude
* NotebookLM
* Google Docs
* Microsoft Word
* Canva (basic formatting)

Preferred:

* Mechanical Engineering background
* Railway knowledge
* Technical writing
* Educational content writing
* SEO writing

---

# Monthly Deliverables

Every Month:

* 8–12 SEO Blog Articles
* 1 Premium Railway e-Magazine (40–60 Pages)
* 8–10 PDF Study Notes
* MCQ Explanations
* Railway Circular Summaries
* Technical Article Updates

---

# Quality Expectations

Content must be:

* 100% original (not copied)
* Well structured
* Fact-checked against the provided source documents
* Written in simple, student-friendly language
* Free from AI hallucinations
* Grammatically correct
* Ready for publication with minimal editing

---

# Tools

Candidates should be comfortable using:

* ChatGPT
* Claude
* NotebookLM
* Canva
* Google Docs
* Microsoft Office

Experience with WordPress is an advantage.

---

# Selection Process

Shortlisted candidates will receive:

* One Railway PDF
* One sample topic

Candidates will prepare:

* One blog article (800–1,200 words)
* One magazine article (2–3 pages)

The sample will be evaluated on:

* Writing quality
* Technical accuracy
* Clarity
* Formatting
* Ability to simplify complex concepts

Paid sample assignments will be preferred.

---

# Proposal Requirements

Please include:

1. Resume
2. Portfolio of technical or educational writing
3. AI tools you use regularly
4. Sample blog/article (if available)
5. Monthly compensation expected
6. Weekly availability
7. Experience in technical, engineering or educational content

---

# Long-Term Opportunity

This is a long-term position with continuous work.

Outstanding performers will be offered additional responsibilities including:

* Book Writing
* Railway Course Development
* Newsletter Creation
* YouTube Script Writing
* AI Content Operations
* Editorial Leadership

If you are passionate about AI-assisted educational content creation and want to work on a large-scale Railway education project, we would love to hear from you.

I represent a leading global crypto exchange and I’m ready to sign a formal partnership agreement focused on rapid user acquisition. The core tactic is influencer collaborations—bringing in credible voices on X (Twitter), YouTube, TikTok and Telegram who can turn their audiences into verified, depositing traders on our platform.

Here’s the scope I need you to drive:
• Locate and vet crypto, trading or finance influencers with genuine, engaged followings. 
• Negotiate win-win terms built around CPA, revenue-share or hybrid structures. 
• Coordinate creatives, referral links and tracking with our in-house stack (Adjust, custom referral dashboard, REST/WebSocket APIs). 
• Launch, monitor and optimise campaigns to hit conversion KPIs: completed KYC, first deposits and trading volume.

Deliverables
1. Countersigned influencer agreements covering a combined reach of 1 million+ followers. 
2. A launch calendar that maps creatives, timelines and target metrics. 
3. Weekly performance reports detailing spend, registrations, cost per acquisition and ROI.

If you already have strong relationships with crypto KOLs and can prove past growth wins for exchanges, I’d like to move quickly on this.

Confirmis ([login to view URL]) is a Singapore-based business information provider specializing in connecting businesses with global capabilities; comprised of industry veterans, Confirmis's business model is designed to overcome perennial lack of data (let alone quality data) to support effective decision-making, particularly in developing economies. 

As a Site Verifier, you will be responsible for verifying a business visual data by conducting a site visit to ensure that we provide reliable and accurate information to our client.

- Take pictures of the target and its vicinity per Confirmis’ standard operating guidelines. 
- Take picture of the surrounding area and provide observation about the target

full_description:
This is a hardware development project. I require a fully functional working prototype, not a simulation, research paper, or theoretical design. 
The final deliverable must demonstrate ultrasonic TOF measurement on small non-ferrous metal components through a working prototype and demonstration video.

I need help taking a lab-bench concept for measuring ultrasonic wave velocity and turning it into a rugged, handheld instrument that works reliably on Platinum, Silver, Nickel, and brass samples. 

The core tasks include designing the full analog front-end (pulser/receiver, low-noise pre-amp, gain control, anti-alias filters), selecting and driving the piezo transducers, and implementing a precise time-of-flight algorithm in an embedded platform. I am open to ARM, DSP, or FPGA solutions as long as we can achieve micro-second timing resolution and keep power draw low enough for a battery-powered unit.

On the digital side I will need firmware that triggers the pulse, captures echoes through a high-speed ADC, processes the signal (envelope detection, filtering, thresholding), and converts flight time to velocity with temperature compensation. A simple menu-driven interface on a small LCD/OLED plus USB-C data output should round out the user experience.

Because the device must differentiate among Platinum, Silver, Nickel, and brass, repeatability and calibration routines are critical. I would like a calibration workflow that lets the user store reference blocks and automatically correct readings.

Deliverables 
• Schematics and PCB Gerbers for the analog and digital boards 
• BOM with production-grade components 
• Firmware source code and build instructions 
• Signal-processing algorithm documentation (MATLAB or Python reference OK) 
• 3D files for a compact enclosure, including battery bay 
• One working prototype verified on all four metals against known velocity tables 

Acceptance criteria 
1. Velocity error ≤ ±1 % on each listed metal over 15–35 °C. 
2. Battery life ≥ 6 h continuous use. 
3. Complete, compilable firmware and reproducible PCB files provided. 

If you have proven experience in ultrasonic NDT, low-noise mixed-signal design, and embedded C/C++ (or VHDL/Verilog), I’d like to review relevant past work and discuss your preferred approach.

full_description:
# Build a Railway LDCE Quiz Website & Android App (MCQ Platform)

## Budget

**₹30,000–₹75,000 (Negotiable)**

**Project Type:** Fixed Price (Long-Term Opportunity)

---

## Project Overview

I am building a premium online learning platform for **Indian Railway LDCE (30%), JE, SSE, AME and Mechanical Department examinations.**

I already have thousands of Railway MCQs, previous year papers, coaching notes, Railway manuals and question banks in PDF format.

I need an experienced developer or development team to build a professional **Quiz Website + Android App** where students can practice MCQs, attempt mock tests and track their progress.

I am open to **customizing an existing open-source quiz platform or LMS** if it reduces development time and cost. Please recommend the best approach.

---

## Project Scope

### Website

* Fully Responsive
* Mobile Friendly
* Fast Loading
* Professional UI

### Android App

* Connected to the same database as the website
* Future-ready for iOS expansion

---

## Admin Panel

I should be able to:

* Add/Edit/Delete Questions
* Upload MCQs in bulk (Excel/CSV preferred)
* Create Topic-wise Tests
* Create Mock Tests
* Create Previous Year Paper Tests
* Add Detailed Explanations
* Upload Images
* Manage Subjects & Categories
* View Student Performance
* Manage Users
* View Test Analytics

No coding knowledge should be required.

---

## Question Structure

Each question should support:

* Question
* Four Options
* Correct Answer
* Detailed Explanation
* Images (Optional)
* Subject
* Topic
* Chapter
* Difficulty Level
* Tags

---

## Categories

Examples:

* Air Brake
* CBC Coupler
* FIAT Bogie
* LHB Coach
* Workshop Technology
* Coaching Stock
* Diesel Locomotive
* Wagon
* Establishment Rules
* General Science
* Previous Year Papers
* Full Mock Tests

---

full_description:
# Railway LDCE MCQ Video Faculty (Remote | Part-Time | Long-Term)

### Compensation

* ₹8,000–15,000 per month (Based on experience and quality)
* Long-term opportunity with performance-based increments

---

## About Us

We are building a premium YouTube channel dedicated to **Indian Railway LDCE (30%), JE, SSE, AME and Mechanical Department examinations**.

Our mission is to become India's highest-quality Railway exam learning platform through concept-based question analysis.

We are looking for a passionate educator who can explain Railway exam questions in a clear, engaging, and student-friendly manner.

---

## Your Role

This is **NOT** a content writing or research job.

We will provide:

* Railway question banks
* Answer keys
* Topic sequence
* Reference notes (where required)

Your responsibility is to record professional educational videos explaining the questions.

---

## Responsibilities

For every assigned question bank:

* Read each question clearly.
* Explain the correct answer.
* Explain why the remaining options are incorrect (where applicable).
* Teach the underlying concept in simple language.
* Share memory tricks and exam tips wherever possible.
* Maintain a classroom-style teaching approach.
* Record the lecture in a professional and engaging manner.

---

## Video Format

* Duration: 60–120 minutes
* HD Video (1080p)
* Clear audio
* Screen sharing with PowerPoint or PDF
* Face camera preferred but not mandatory
* English or Hindi (Odia is an added advantage)

---

## Monthly Deliverables

Record approximately:

* 8–10 Question Bank Analysis Videos
* Each video covering 50–100 Railway MCQs
* Duration: 60–120 minutes per video

---

## We Will Provide

* Question Banks
* Answer Keys
* Teaching Notes
* PowerPoint (if required)
* Topic-wise Instructions

No research or script writing is required.

---

## Preferred Candidates

Candidates with any of the following backgrounds are encouraged to apply:

* Mechanical Engineering
* Railway Employee
* Railway Coaching Faculty
* JE/SSE/LDCE Aspirant
* Technical Trainer
* Engineering Lecturer

Prior Railway knowledge is preferred but not mandatory if your teaching skills are excellent.

---

## Equipment Required

* Laptop/Desktop
* Good Microphone
* Stable Internet Connection
* Quiet Recording Environment

---

## Selection Process

Shortlisted candidates will receive:

* 20–30 Railway MCQs
* Answer Key
* Teaching Instructions

Candidates will record a **15–20 minute sample lecture**.

The sample will be evaluated on:

* Teaching clarity
* Technical accuracy
* Communication skills
* Student engagement
* Audio & Video quality

---

## Payment & Review Process

* Submitted videos will be reviewed within **5 working days**.
* Evaluation will be based on:

 * Accuracy
 * Teaching quality
 * Completeness
 * Audio and video quality
 * Adherence to instructions
* If minor corrections are required, feedback will be provided and the creator will have an opportunity to revise the video.
* Payment will be released promptly after the videos meet the agreed quality standards.
* Long-term performers will receive regular work and higher compensation based on performance.

---

## Intellectual Property

All videos, recordings, presentations, teaching materials, and related content created for this project will become the exclusive intellectual property of our organization upon payment. We reserve the right to edit, publish, monetize, and distribute the content across YouTube and other educational platforms.

---

## How to Apply

Please include:

1. Resume
2. Educational Qualification
3. Teaching Experience (if any)
4. Mechanical/Railway Background (if any)
5. A 3–5 minute sample teaching video (preferred)
6. Languages you can teach in
7. Expected Monthly Compensation
8. Weekly Availability

We are looking for a long-term team member who is passionate about education and wants to grow with our Railway learning platform.

full_description:
Here is a shorter version that stays well under 10,000 characters:

## REQUIRED PROPOSAL RESPONSE

Begin your proposal with the exact words:

**“INDEPENDENT AUTOMOTIVE 3D DESIGNER”**

Proposals that do not begin with those words may not be reviewed.

Your proposal must include:

1. Confirmation that you are an independent freelancer and will personally complete all work.

2. Confirmation that no part of the project will be subcontracted, outsourced, transferred to an agency, or completed by another designer.

3. Examples of previous automotive 3D modeling, widebody-kit, fender-flare, bumper, diffuser, or body-panel work.

4. Confirmation that you can deliver:

 * Individual STL files
 * Individual STEP files
 * Editable Blender files
 * One complete assembled model
 * Every component separately

5. Confirmation that the design will be true 1:1 scale for a 2013 Porsche Cayenne GTS.

6. Confirmation that every component will be delivered separately.

7. Confirmation that vents and end caps will remain separate, removable parts.

8. Confirmation that you understand the supplied STL is AI-generated and may contain inaccurate dimensions, poor body surfaces, open edges, non-manifold geometry, intersections, excessive polygons, poor topology, uneven thickness, asymmetry, or other defects.

9. Explain how you will repair, remodel, retopologize, or completely rebuild the supplied STL where necessary. Simply smoothing the mesh or adding thickness will not be accepted.

10. Explain how you will verify that the front flares extend exactly 3 inches outward from the original factory front fenders.

11. Explain how you will verify that the rear flares extend exactly 5 inches outward from the original factory rear quarter panels.

12. Explain how you will verify rear-door operation, wheel-opening alignment, body lines, panel gaps, bumper seams, door seams, and overall body fitment.

13. Explain how you will create proper mounting flanges for automotive two-sided tape.

14. Explain how you will create reinforced mounting areas for exposed Liberty Walk-style bolts.

15. Explain how you will verify that every STL is watertight, manifold, correctly scaled, free from open edges and intersections, and suitable for slicing and printing.

16. Provide your estimated completion time.

17. Provide your availability for progress updates and revisions.

18. Confirm that progress updates will include actual Blender or CAD screenshots showing measurements, topology, fitment, wall thickness, door clearance, and separated parts.

## FINAL AGREEMENT

The hired freelancer is responsible for personally producing a complete, accurate, printable, editable, and properly organized widebody-kit design that meets all written requirements and approved references.

The supplied AI-generated STL is only a reference and starting point. It is not guaranteed to be accurate, symmetrical, correctly scaled, watertight, manifold, printable, or production-ready.

Repairing, remodeling, retopologizing, or completely rebuilding the geometry is part of the professional work. The freelancer must not simply smooth the AI mesh, add thickness, make minor changes, or return substantially the same defective model.

The completed kit must fit the body shape and proportions of a 2013 Porsche Cayenne GTS. It must follow the OEM wheel openings, fender curves, body lines, door seams, panel gaps, rocker panels, front-bumper seams, and rear-bumper seams.

The front flares must extend 3 inches from the original factory front-fender surfaces. The rear flares must extend 5 inches from the original factory rear-quarter-panel surfaces. These dimensions must be verified and shown using measurable CAD references.

All doors must open and close normally. No flare, end cap, side-skirt section, mounting flange, or other component may interfere with the rear doors.

The kit must include flat mounting flanges for automotive two-sided tape and reinforced mounting areas for exposed bolts. Bolt holes must not be placed in thin or unsupported areas.

The parts must be hollow and use the agreed wall thickness. Excessively thick walls, including 10 mm, 15 mm, or 22 mm areas, will not be accepted unless specifically approved.

Every component must remain separately editable and separately printable. Vents, end caps, front flares, rear flares, side skirts, bumper parts, splitter parts, diffuser parts, and other removable details must not be permanently merged unless approved.

The project is not complete until I receive:

* Complete assembled model
* Every individual component
* Left-side and right-side parts
* Every vent separately
* Every end cap separately
* Individual STL files
* Individual STEP files
* Editable Blender source files
* Properly named and organized folders
* Complete numbered build list
* Individual-part renders
* Labeled component renders
* Exploded views
* Final assembled renders
* Front, rear, left, right, and perspective views
* Front 3-inch dimension verification
* Rear 5-inch dimension verification
* Rear-door-clearance verification
* Body-fitment verification
* Mounting-flange verification
* Bolt-reinforcement verification
* Wall-thickness verification
* Watertight and manifold verification
* Printability verification
* All agreed corrections and revisions

Screenshots and renders are progress evidence only. They do not replace the required STL, STEP, Blender, assembled-model, or individual-component files.

Final payment or milestone approval will only occur after the files have been inspected and the dimensions, fitment, door clearance, file separation, organization, editability, and printability have been verified.

No subcontracting or outsourcing is permitted. The freelancer hired for this project must personally perform the work. Unauthorized outsourcing or transfer of the project will be considered a violation of the agreement.

Apply only if you personally have the automotive modeling, CAD, mesh-repair, fitment, and 3D-printing knowledge required to complete the entire project.
